summary: Phase 4 testing (news-split + sector-analysis) for RELIANCE. Backend: 18/18 pytest cases pass (news-split shape/counts/sentiment, sector-analysis with peer aggregates and deep links, plus regression on /overview /news /red-flags /events /legal /social). Frontend: dashboard renders correctly with Peers → SectorAnalysis → NewsSplit → RedFlags/Events ordering verified by Y-coordinates; tabs (Company 19 / Sector 25 / Market/Misc 1) switch properly; 5 colored deep-link buttons all have target=_blank rel=noreferrer pointing to trendlyne, stockedge, aftermarkets, moneycontrol, NSE; old monolithic 'Latest News & Sentiment' panel removed. Verdict bar 'Sector tracking Nifty 50' with Rel 1M +0.18% renders. Stock vs peers: 'Pricier by +165.86% on P/E'.

issues: Console warns 'width(-1) height(-1) of chart should be > 0' on first render before stock is selected (cosmetic recharts warning, not blocking)

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid attributes to NewsSplitPanel tab buttons (e.g. news-split-tab-company/sector/market) and individual news cards to make UI tests selector-stable. Tabs are currently locatable only via inner text.
(Optional) Suppress recharts 'width(-1)' warning on landing page when no chart container is mounted.
critical_code_review_comments: sector_service.get_sector_news catches all exceptions silently and returns []; consider differentiating 4xx vs network errors in logs for easier debugging.
categorize_news uses simple substring matching; could false-positive when company keyword is a common word (e.g. 'reliance' as adjective). For RELIANCE this works.

/api/stock/{symbol}/sector-analysis re-fetches peers from /api/stock/{symbol}/peers logic — duplicate yfinance calls between this endpoint and the dedicated /peers endpoint. Both use 60s in-memory cache so impact is small but worth a shared helper.
_CACHE is module-level dict without TTL eviction — grows unbounded over time across all symbols. Replace with cachetools.TTLCache or LRU.
seed_data_creation: None - tests use live RELIANCE data from yfinance/Moneycontrol/Screener.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 confirmed end-to-end. Backend endpoints /api/stock/RELIANCE/news-split returns counts {company:19, sector:25, market:1} with sentimentLabel on items; /api/stock/RELIANCE/sector-analysis returns sector_index ^CNXENERGY, peer_aggregates with top_gainer (GAIL), top_loser (PETRONET), stock_vs_peers (Pricier +165.86%), and 5 deep_links. Frontend Dashboard renders the new panels in the right order; NewsSplitPanel tabs work; deep-link buttons open in new tabs with rel=noreferrer. Old monolithic news panel confirmed removed. Test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_phase4.py is the regression for this phase.
